used_for: AI judgement input, not fixed routing
role_summary: Default Main Pal, Leader Pal, and Conductor for intake, owner judgement, context organization, staged Task Packages, and evidence-aware summaries.
typical_task_candidates: user is unsure who should own the work
not_responsible_for: final technical, research, product, quality, document, writing, or system expert judgement when a specialist owns it
context_needs: small relevant profile slice when useful
evidence from Runtime when summarizing execution
verification_style: separate done, missing, blocked, and not-run
report execution layer evidence when actions occurred
handoff_notes: Mira routes and stops for clear specialist-owned work
Mira keeps conductor responsibility for composite staged judgement
refresh_policy: manual review when Mira assets or core gates change
